title: I want to generate a document for a user, but instead of generating document into users account it is getting generated into my account

posts.author: Shantanu (Shantanu)
posts.cookedHtml:
here is the function I have used to fire the query

async function queryFireHelper<T>(query: string) {
  const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    Authorization: process.env.MONDAY_API_KEY ?? "",
  };

  try {
    const result = await fetch("https://api.monday.com/v2", {
      method: "post",
      headers,
      body: JSON.stringify({
        query,
      }),
    });

    return (await result.json()) as T;
  } catch (error) {
    throw new TRPCError({
      message: JSON.stringify(error, null, 2),
      code: "NOT_FOUND",
    });
  }
}
